Function declaration for confirming a worker switch with options for default setting and callback handling.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that declares a function [`switch_worker_confirm`](<#switch_worker_confirm>). The function is designed to prompt the user to confirm a switch to a new worker ID. It takes several parameters: `new_worker_id` to specify the new worker ID, `set_as_default` to determine if the new worker should be set as the default, `window_stack` to specify which window stack to push the dialog to, and `exit_callback` and `callback_context` for handling dialog pop events and passing context to callbacks, respectively. The file includes dependencies on `applib/ui/window_stack.h` and `kernel/events.h`, indicating that it interacts with a user interface and event handling system.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/ui/window_stack.h`
- `kernel/events.h`


# Function Declarations (Public API)

---
### switch\_worker\_confirm<!-- {{#callable_declaration:switch_worker_confirm}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../src/fw/popups/switch_worker_ui.h#L27>)

Displays a confirmation dialog to switch the background worker application.
- **Description**: Use this function to prompt the user to confirm switching the current background worker application to a new one. It should be called when a change in the background worker is desired, and the user needs to approve this change. The function will not display a dialog if a confirmation is already on screen or if the new worker is the same as the current one. It requires a valid `window_stack` to display the dialog and can optionally set the new worker as the default.
- **Inputs**:
    - `new_worker_id`: The ID of the new worker application to switch to. Must be a valid `AppInstallId`.
    - `set_as_default`: A boolean indicating whether the new worker should be set as the default after confirmation. Use `true` to set as default, `false` otherwise.
    - `window_stack`: A pointer to the `WindowStack` where the confirmation dialog will be pushed. Must not be null.
- **Output**: None
- **See Also**: [`switch_worker_confirm`](<switch_worker_ui.c.md#switch_worker_confirm>)  (Implementation)
